title: LibJS: Skip null entries in numeric string cache when gathering roots
task_prompt: Fix the crash triggered by Tests/LibWeb/Crash/Internals/dump-gc-graph.html. The GC root-gathering pass iterates the numeric string cache in VM.cpp but does not skip null entries, causing a null pointer dereference. The test page calls internals.dumpGCGraph() which triggers root gathering; it should complete without crashing.
